---
title: "Week 5 — Data Visualisation"
subtitle: "ECON 3209 · Kerala Agricultural University"
---

## Week 5 Overview

Create clear, publication-quality charts with Matplotlib and Seaborn. Covers foundational plots, statistical charts, and interactive figures.

| Lecture | Topic | Slides |
|---------|-------|--------|
| Lecture 1 | Matplotlib Foundations | [Open →](lecture-01.qmd) |
| Lecture 2 | Seaborn Statistical Charts | [Open →](lecture-02.qmd) |
| Lecture 3 | Interactive & Publication-Ready Figures | [Open →](lecture-03.qmd) |
